title: UK Macro Trends
description: Long-run macro, social, and quality-of-life indicators for the UK.
methodology: Annual values are assembled from public statistical sources (BoE, ONS, World Bank, OECD, WHO, OWID, EIU).
Where source frequencies are monthly/quarterly, yearly averages are used.
Some early-year values are interpolated between benchmark observations to keep charts continuous; inspect source links for underlying raw tables.

metrics.name: Bank of England base rate
metrics.description: Bank Rate / policy rate over time.

metrics.name: CPI inflation
metrics.description: Consumer price inflation, annual percentage change.

metrics.name: Young adults living with parents (ages 20–34)
metrics.description: Share of young adults living in parental home.

metrics.name: Real median annual pay
metrics.description: Median annual pay adjusted for inflation.

sources.name: World Bank
sources.note: PM2.5 air pollution, mean annual exposure

metrics.name: Renewables share of electricity
metrics.description: Share of electricity generation from renewables.
